results.question: For patients with severe degree of thrombosis, list their ID, sex and disease the patient is diagnosed with.
results.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  P.id,
  P.sex,
  P.diagnosis
FROM benchmark_tmp.patient AS P
JOIN benchmark_tmp.examination AS E
  ON CAST(P.id AS DECIMAL) = CAST(E.id AS DECIMAL)
WHERE
  CAST(E.thrombosis AS INTEGER) = 2
LIMIT 200

results.question: List the full name of the Student_Club members that grew up in Illinois state.
results.sql:
SELECT
  benchmark_tmp.member.first_name || ' ' || benchmark_tmp.member.last_name
FROM
  benchmark_tmp.member
JOIN
  benchmark_tmp.zip_code
ON
  benchmark_tmp.member.zip = benchmark_tmp.zip_code.zip_code
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.zip_code.state = 'Illinois'
LIMIT 200

results.question: State the date Connor Hilton paid his/her dues.
results.sql:
SELECT
  T1.date_received
FROM benchmark_tmp.income AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.member AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id
WHERE
  T2.first_name = 'Connor' AND T2.last_name = 'Hilton' AND T1.source = 'Dues'
LIMIT 1

results.question: How many members attended the "Women's Soccer" event?
results.sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT benchmark_tmp.attendance.link_to_member)
FROM benchmark_tmp.attendance
JOIN benchmark_tmp.event
  ON benchmark_tmp.attendance.link_to_event = benchmark_tmp.event.event_id
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.event.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'
LIMIT 200

results.question: Which event has the lowest cost?
results.sql:
SELECT
  T2.event_name
FROM benchmark_tmp.expense AS T1
JOIN benchmark_tmp.budget AS T3
  ON T1.link_to_budget = T3.budget_id
JOIN benchmark_tmp.event AS T2
  ON T3.link_to_event = T2.event_id
GROUP BY
  T2.event_name
ORDER BY
  SUM(CAST(T1.cost AS NUMERIC)) ASC
LIMIT 1

results.question: How many members of the Student_Club have major in 'Physics Teaching'?
results.sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(T1.member_id)
FROM benchmark_tmp.member AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.major AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id
WHERE
  T2.major_name = 'Physics Teaching'
LIMIT 200

results.question: List out the full name and total cost that member id "rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v" incurred?
results.sql:
SELECT
  m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name,
  SUM(CAST(e.cost AS NUMERIC)) AS total_cost
FROM benchmark_tmp.member AS m
JOIN benchmark_tmp.expense AS e
  ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE
  m.member_id = 'rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v'
GROUP BY
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name
LIMIT 200

results.question: List all the withdrawals in cash transactions that the client with the id 3356 makes.
results.sql:
SELECT
  benchmark_tmp.trans.trans_id,
  benchmark_tmp.trans.account_id,
  benchmark_tmp.trans.date,
  benchmark_tmp.trans.type,
  benchmark_tmp.trans.operation,
  benchmark_tmp.trans.amount,
  benchmark_tmp.trans.balance,
  benchmark_tmp.trans.k_symbol,
  benchmark_tmp.trans.bank,
  benchmark_tmp.trans.account
FROM
  benchmark_tmp.trans
JOIN
  benchmark_tmp.disp ON benchmark_tmp.trans.account_id

results.question: Please list all the superpowers of 3-D Man.
results.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T3.power_name
FROM benchmark_tmp.superhero AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.hero_power AS T2
  ON T1.id = T2.hero_id
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.superpower AS T3
  ON T2.power_id = T3.id
WHERE
  T1.superhero_name = '3-D Man'
LIMIT 200

results.question: What is the average weight of all female superheroes?
results.sql:
SELECT AVG(CAST(benchmark_tmp.superhero.weight_kg AS REAL))
FROM benchmark_tmp.superhero
JOIN benchmark_tmp.gender
  ON benchmark_tmp.superhero.gender_id = benchmark_tmp.gender.id
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.gender.gender = 'Female'
LIMIT 200

results.question: Provide the eye colour of the superhero who has Karen Beecher-Duncan as their full name.
results.sql:
SELECT
  T2.colour
FROM benchmark_tmp.superhero AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.colour AS T2
  ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id
WHERE
  T1.full_name = 'Karen Beecher-Duncan'

LIMIT 200

results.question: What is the surname of the driver with the best lap time in race number 19 in the second qualifying period?
results.sql:
SELECT
  T2.surname
FROM benchmark_tmp.qualifying AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.drivers AS T2
  ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE
  T1.raceid = '19'
ORDER BY
  T1.q2 ASC
LIMIT 1

results.question: What is his number of the driver who finished 0:01:54 in the Q3 of qualifying race No.903?
results.sql:
SELECT
  T1.number
FROM benchmark_tmp.qualifying AS T1
WHERE
  T1.raceid = '903' AND T1.q3 = '0:01:54'
LIMIT 1

results.question: Which race was Alex Yoong in when he was in track number less than 20?
results.sql:
SELECT
  T3.name
FROM benchmark_tmp.drivers AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.driverstandings AS T2
  ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.races AS T3
  ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE
  T1.forename = 'Alex' AND T1.surname = 'Yoong' AND CAST(T1.number AS REAL) < 20
LIMIT 1

results.question: What's the finish time for the driver who ranked second in 2008's Chinese Grand Prix?
results.sql: SELECT T1.time FROM benchmark_tmp.results AS T1 JOIN benchmark_tmp.races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T2.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T2.year = '2008' AND T1.rank = '2.0' LIMIT 1

results.question: Among the events attended by more than 10 members of the Student_Club, how many of them are meetings?
results.sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.event_id)
FROM
  (SELECT T2.event_id
   FROM benchmark_tmp.attendance AS T1
   INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.event AS T2
     ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
   GROUP BY
     T2.event_id
   HAVING
     COUNT(T1.link_to_member) > 10) AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.event AS T2
  ON T1.event_id = T2.event_id
WHERE
  T2.type = 'Meeting'
LIMIT 200

results.question: Identify the type of expenses and their total value approved for 'October Meeting' event.
results.sql:
SELECT
  benchmark_tmp.expense.expense_description,
  SUM(CAST(benchmark_tmp.expense.cost AS REAL))
FROM benchmark_tmp.expense
JOIN benchmark_tmp.budget
  ON benchmark_tmp.expense.link_to_budget = benchmark_tmp.budget.budget_id
JOIN benchmark_tmp.event
  ON benchmark_tmp.budget.link_to_event = benchmark_tmp.event.event_id
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.event.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND benchmark_tmp

results.question: What was the average monthly consumption of customers in SME for the year 2013?
results.sql:
SELECT AVG(CAST(ym.consumption AS REAL))
FROM benchmark_tmp.yearmonth AS ym
JOIN benchmark_tmp.customers AS c ON ym.customerid = c.customerid
WHERE c.segment = 'SME'
  AND ym.date LIKE '2013%'
LIMIT 200

results.question: Please list the countries of the gas stations with transactions taken place in June, 2013.
results.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  benchmark_tmp.gasstations.country
FROM benchmark_tmp.gasstations
JOIN benchmark_tmp.transactions_1k
  ON benchmark_tmp.gasstations.gasstationid = benchmark_tmp.transactions_1k.gasstationid
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.transactions_1k.date LIKE '2013-06-%'
LIMIT 200

results.question: For all the people who paid more than 29.00 per unit of product id No.5. Give their consumption status in the August of 2012.
results.sql:
SELECT
  benchmark_tmp.yearmonth.customerid,
  benchmark_tmp.yearmonth.consumption
FROM benchmark_tmp.yearmonth
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.yearmonth.customerid IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      benchmark_tmp.transactions_1k.customerid
    FROM benchmark_tmp.transactions_1k
    WHERE
      benchmark_tmp.transactions_1k.productid = '5'
      AND CAST(benchmark_tmp.transactions_1k.amount AS REAL) > 0
      A

results.question: What are the bonds that have phosphorus and nitrogen as their atom elements?
results.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.bond_id
FROM benchmark_tmp.connected AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.atom AS T2
  ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.atom AS T3
  ON T1.atom_id2 = T3.atom_id
WHERE
  (
    T2.element = 'P' AND T3.element = 'N'
  ) OR (
    T2.element = 'N' AND T3.element = 'P'
  )
LIMIT 200

results.question: What is the average number of bonds the atoms with the element iodine have?
results.sql:
SELECT
    AVG(bonds_per_atom.num_bonds)
FROM
    (SELECT
        benchmark_tmp.atom.atom_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT benchmark_tmp.connected.bond_id) AS num_bonds
    FROM
        benchmark_tmp.atom
    JOIN
        benchmark_tmp.connected ON benchmark_tmp.atom.atom_id = benchmark_tmp.connected.atom_id OR benchmark_tmp.atom.atom_id = benchmark_tmp.connected.atom_id2
    WHERE
        benchmark_tmp

results.question: List the names and funding types of schools from Riverside-related school districts where the average SAT math score across schools exceeds 400.
results.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  frpm.school_name,
  frpm.charter_funding_type
FROM benchmark_tmp.frpm AS frpm
JOIN benchmark_tmp.satscores AS satscores
  ON frpm.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE
  satscores.rtype = 'S' AND satscores.dname LIKE '%Riverside%'
GROUP BY
  frpm.school_name,
  frpm.charter_funding_type,
  frpm.cdscode
HAVING
  AVG(CAST(satscores.avgscrmath AS REAL)) > 400
LIMIT 200

results.question: Calculate the total atoms with triple-bond molecules containing the element phosphorus or bromine.
results.sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(benchmark_tmp.atom.atom_id)
FROM
  benchmark_tmp.atom
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.atom.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      T1.molecule_id
    FROM
      benchmark_tmp.atom AS T1
    JOIN
      benchmark_tmp.bond AS T2
    ON
      T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
    WHERE
      T2.bond_type = '#' AND T1.element IN ('P', 'Br')
  )
LIMIT 200

results.question: How many Brazilian Portuguese translated sets are inside the Commander block?
results.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.setcode) FROM benchmark_tmp.set_translations AS T1 JOIN benchmark_tmp.sets AS T2 ON T1.setcode = T2.code WHERE T1.language = 'Brazilian Portuguese' AND T2.block = 'Commander'
LIMIT 200

results.question: What is the telephone number for the school with the lowest average score in reading in Fresno Unified?
results.sql:
SELECT
  T1.phone
FROM benchmark_tmp.schools AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.satscores AS T2
  ON T1.cdscode = T2.cds
WHERE
  T2.dname = 'Fresno Unified'
ORDER BY
  CAST(T2.avgscrread AS REAL) ASC
LIMIT 1

results.question: For the user No.24, how many times is the number of his/her posts compared to his/her votes?
results.sql:
SELECT
    CAST(
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM benchmark_tmp.posts WHERE benchmark_tmp.posts.owneruserid = '24.0')
        AS REAL
    )
    /
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM benchmark_tmp.votes WHERE benchmark_tmp.votes.userid = '24.0'
    )
LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the average of the up votes and the average user age for users creating more than 10 posts?
results.sql:
SELECT
  AVG(CAST(u.upvotes AS NUMERIC)),
  AVG(CAST(u.age AS NUMERIC))
FROM benchmark_tmp.users AS u
JOIN (
  SELECT
    p.owneruserid
  FROM benchmark_tmp.posts AS p
  WHERE p.owneruserid IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    p.owneruserid
  HAVING
    COUNT(p.id) > 10
) AS user_posts ON u.id = user_posts.owneruserid LIMIT 200

results.question: Which post by slashnick has the most answers count? State the post ID.
results.sql:
SELECT
  T1.id
FROM benchmark_tmp.posts AS T1
JOIN benchmark_tmp.users AS T2
  ON T1.owneruserid = T2.id
WHERE
  T2.displayname = 'slashnick'
ORDER BY
  CAST(T1.answercount AS INTEGER) DESC
LIMIT 1

results.question: Identify the total views on the post 'Computer Game Datasets'. Name the user who posted it last time.
results.sql:
SELECT
    CAST(p.viewcount AS INTEGER) AS total_views,
    (
        SELECT
            u.displayname
        FROM
            benchmark_tmp.posthistory AS ph
        JOIN
            benchmark_tmp.users AS u ON CAST(ph.userid AS INTEGER) = CAST(u.id AS INTEGER)
        WHERE
            ph.postid = p.id
        ORDER BY
            ph.creationdate DESC
        
    ) AS last_poster_display_name

results.question: Among the posts with views ranging from 100 to 150, what is the comment with the highest score?
results.sql:
SELECT
  benchmark_tmp.comments.text
FROM benchmark_tmp.comments
JOIN benchmark_tmp.posts
  ON benchmark_tmp.comments.postid = benchmark_tmp.posts.id
WHERE
  CAST(benchmark_tmp.posts.viewcount AS REAL) BETWEEN 100.0 AND 150.0
ORDER BY
  CAST(benchmark_tmp.comments.score AS REAL) DESC
LIMIT 1

Otherwise, yes, a percentage can be as close to zero as you can imagine because it is bounded between 0 and 100 and continuous on that interval.

gold.Text: Welcome to Cross Validated David P, for more information about the site and how to ask questions, you can check out the [FAQ](http://stats.stackexchange.com/faq). Is your question just about whether the calculation is right or wrong (it is wrong, with the numbers you give on your second line the result of the operation is 0.187, rounded)? Otherwise, yes, a percentage can be as close to zero as you can imagine because it is bounded between 0 and 100 and continuous on that interval.

results.question: Among the superheroes with the super power of "Super Strength", how many of them have a height of over 200cm?
results.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.id)
FROM benchmark_tmp.superhero AS T1
JOIN benchmark_tmp.hero_power AS T2
  ON T1.id = T2.hero_id
JOIN benchmark_tmp.superpower AS T3
  ON T2.power_id = T3.id
WHERE
  T3.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND CAST(T1.height_cm AS REAL) > 200.0
LIMIT 200

results.question: What are the names of the superheroes with the power of death touch?
results.sql:
SELECT
  DISTINCT benchmark_tmp.superhero.superhero_name
FROM benchmark_tmp.superhero
JOIN benchmark_tmp.hero_power
  ON benchmark_tmp.superhero.id = benchmark_tmp.hero_power.hero_id
JOIN benchmark_tmp.superpower
  ON benchmark_tmp.hero_power.power_id = benchmark_tmp.superpower.id
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.superpower.power_name = 'Death Touch'
LIMIT 200

results.question: Calculate the percentage of superheroes with blue eyes.
results.sql:
SELECT
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(s.id)
FROM
    benchmark_tmp.superhero AS s
JOIN
    benchmark_tmp.colour AS c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
LIMIT 200

results.question: Identify the gender of the superhero who has the ability of Phoenix Force.
results.sql:
SELECT
  T4.gender
FROM benchmark_tmp.superpower AS T1
JOIN benchmark_tmp.hero_power AS T2
  ON T1.id = T2.power_id
JOIN benchmark_tmp.superhero AS T3
  ON T2.hero_id = T3.id
JOIN benchmark_tmp.gender AS T4
  ON T3.gender_id = T4.id
WHERE
  T1.power_name = 'Phoenix Force'
LIMIT 1

results.question: For the constructor which got the highest point in the race No. 9 , what is its introduction website?
results.sql:
SELECT
  T2.url
FROM benchmark_tmp.constructorresults AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.constructors AS T2
  ON T1.constructorid = T2.constructorid
WHERE
  T1.raceid = '9'
ORDER BY
  CAST(T1.points AS REAL) DESC
LIMIT 1

results.question: Among all European Grand Prix races, what is the percentage of the races were hosted in Germany?
results.sql:
SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN benchmark_tmp.circuits.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(benchmark_tmp.races.raceid)
FROM
  benchmark_tmp.races
JOIN
  benchmark_tmp.circuits
ON
  benchmark_tmp.races.circuitid = benchmark_tmp.circuits.circuitid
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.races.name = 'European Grand Prix'
LIMIT 200

results.question: What was the fastest lap speed among all drivers in the 2009 Spanish Grand Prix?
results.sql:
SELECT MAX(CAST(benchmark_tmp.results.fastestlapspeed AS REAL))
FROM benchmark_tmp.races
JOIN benchmark_tmp.results ON benchmark_tmp.races.raceid = benchmark_tmp.results.raceid
WHERE benchmark_tmp.races.year = '2009' AND benchmark_tmp.races.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix' LIMIT 200

results.question: What was the final score for the match on September 24, 2008, in the Belgian Jupiler League between the home team and the away team?
results.sql:
SELECT
  benchmark_tmp.match.home_team_goal,
  benchmark_tmp.match.away_team_goal
FROM
  benchmark_tmp.match
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.match.date LIKE '2008-09-24%'
LIMIT 1

results.question: Among the male patients who have a normal level of white blood cells, how many of them have an abnormal fibrinogen level?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT benchmark_tmp.laboratory.id) FROM benchmark_tmp.laboratory WHERE benchmark_tmp.laboratory.wbc IS NOT NULL AND benchmark_tmp.laboratory.fg IS NULL LIMIT 200

results.question: What's Angela Sanders's major?
results.sql:
SELECT
  benchmark_tmp.member.link_to_major
FROM benchmark_tmp.member
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.member.first_name = 'Angela' AND benchmark_tmp.member.last_name = 'Sanders'
LIMIT 1

results.question: Among the students from the Student_Club who attended the event "Women's Soccer", how many of them want a T-shirt that's in medium size?
results.sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(T1.member_id)
FROM benchmark_tmp.member AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.attendance AS T2
  ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member
WHERE
  T2.link_to_event = 'rec2N69DMcrqN9PJC' AND T1.t_shirt_size = 'Medium'
LIMIT 200

results.question: How many times was the budget in Advertisement for "Yearly Kickoff" meeting more than "October Meeting"?
results.sql: SELECT 0 LIMIT 200

results.question: Write the full name of the member who spent money for water, veggie tray and supplies and include the cost of it.
results.sql:
SELECT
  benchmark_tmp.expense.link_to_member,
  SUM(CAST(benchmark_tmp.expense.cost AS REAL)) AS total_cost
FROM
  benchmark_tmp.expense
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.expense.expense_description LIKE '%Water%' OR
  benchmark_tmp.expense.expense_description LIKE '%Veggie Tray%' OR
  benchmark_tmp.expense.expense_description LIKE '%Supplies%'
GROUP BY
  benchmark_tmp.expense.link_to_member
ORDER BY
  total

results.question: Tally the toxicology element of the 4th atom of each molecule that was carcinogenic.
results.sql:
SELECT
  a.element,
  COUNT(a.element)
FROM (
  SELECT
    benchmark_tmp.atom.molecule_id,
    benchmark_tmp.atom.element,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY benchmark_tmp.atom.molecule_id ORDER BY benchmark_tmp.atom.atom_id) AS rn
  FROM
    benchmark_tmp.atom
) AS a
WHERE
  a.rn = 4
GROUP BY
  a.element
ORDER BY
  COUNT(a.element) DESC
LIMIT 200

results.question: In superheroes with height between 150 to 180, what is the percentage of heroes published by Marvel Comics?
results.sql:
SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN benchmark_tmp.publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(benchmark_tmp.superhero.superhero_name)
FROM
  benchmark_tmp.superhero
JOIN
  benchmark_tmp.publisher
ON
  benchmark_tmp.superhero.publisher_id = benchmark_tmp.publisher.id
WHERE
  benchmark_tmp.superhero.height_cm BETWEEN 150 AND 180
LIMIT 200

results.question: How much faster in percentage is the champion than the driver who finished the race last in the 2008 Australian Grand Prix?
results.sql:
SELECT
    (
        (SELECT CAST(benchmark_tmp.results.milliseconds AS REAL)
         FROM benchmark_tmp.results
         WHERE benchmark_tmp.results.raceid = '18'
         ORDER BY CAST(benchmark_tmp.results.positionorder AS INTEGER) DESC
         
        )
        -
        (SELECT CAST(benchmark_tmp.results.milliseconds AS REAL)
         FROM benchmark_tmp.results
         WHERE benchmark_tmp

results.question: What is the constructor reference name of the champion in the 2009 Singapore Grand Prix? Please give its website.
results.sql:
SELECT
  T1.constructorref,
  T1.url
FROM benchmark_tmp.constructors AS T1
JOIN benchmark_tmp.results AS T2
  ON T1.constructorid = T2.constructorid
WHERE
  T2.raceid = '18' AND T2.position = '1.0'
LIMIT 1

results.question: Among the patients whose creatinine level is abnormal, how many of them aren't 70 yet?
What percentage of cards with format commander and legal status do not have a content warning?
results.sql:
SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.hascontentwarning = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.uuid)
FROM benchmark_tmp.legalities AS T1
INNER JOIN benchmark_tmp.cards AS T2
  ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid
WHERE
  T1.format = 'commander' AND T1.status = 'Legal'
LIMIT 200
